name: list_enrollments
description: List all enrollments for a course, showing who is enrolled and in what role. Returns user details, enrollment state, and role information. Useful for instructors to see their class roster or for administrators to audit access.

parameters.name: type[]
parameters.description: Filter by enrollment type: StudentEnrollment, TeacherEnrollment, TaEnrollment, ObserverEnrollment, DesignerEnrollment.

parameters.name: state[]
parameters.description: Filter by enrollment state: active, invited, creation_pending, deleted, rejected, completed, inactive.
